name: knowledge-server
description: A consolidation-aware knowledge system that distills episodic memory from OpenCode sessions into retrievable knowledge, with embedding-based associative activation.

scripts.build: bun build --compile --minify src/index.ts --outfile dist/knowledge-server && bun build --compile --minify src/daemon/index.ts --outfile dist/knowledge-daemon
scripts.lint: bunx biome check src/ tests/ plugin/
scripts.format: bunx biome format --write src/ tests/ plugin/
